title: limeum sulcatum
intro: Limeum sulcatum, also known as the hairy caltrop or hairy limeum, is a plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower fever, and improve digestion, making it beneficial for overall health. Limeum sulcatum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
